title: Importing to an existing board to update a single column
excerpt: I have email campaigns sent to many customers on my board, based on certain stage on their app. I would like to update the status on the Monday.com for them. Is there a way I can bulk upload just one column for a board f…

posts.author: PikMykid (ceekay)
posts.cookedHtml: I have email campaigns sent to many customers on my board, based on certain stage on their app. I would like to update the status on the Monday.com for them. Is there a way I can bulk upload just one column for a board from an excel with you impacting any other connected boards or columns.

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PikMykid!

Welcome to the community

If you have not already figured this out on your end, I wanted to share a quick video of a solution that I think should work for your use case. Can you take a look here and let me know your thoughts?

-Aron

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
